scanner.title: Pixel Room Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan your room feng shui in 30 seconds

canvas.doorHint: Tap an edge cell to place your door
canvas.proportionHint: Draw the approximate shape of your room. Exact measurements are not needed.
canvas.hallwayHint: Tip: If your room has an entryway or hallway, draw it first, then place the door at the end.

compass.title: Calibrate Direction
compass.permissionRequest: Enable compass sensor for automatic detection
compass.manualHint: Rotate to align with your room's actual direction

result.shareQuote: Just feng shui'd my {roomType} in 30 seconds! 🎯
result.sectorActivated: Your {direction} sector is activated! Keep this area clean and well-lit.
result.sectorNotActivated: The {direction} sector has low coverage. Consider using mirrors to symbolically expand this area.

bedroom.wealth: Place a red lamp or crystal here to activate wealth energy while you sleep.
bedroom.sickness: Avoid placing your bed in this area. Add metal wind chimes to disperse negative energy.
bedroom.missing: Your bedroom is missing the wealth corner. Place a mirror on the adjacent wall to symbolically extend the space.

office.wealth: Keep this area bright and clutter-free. A prosperity plant will enhance wealth energy.
office.sickness: Avoid facing this direction when working. Use salt lamps to purify the energy.
office.missing: Add a small fountain or water feature near this area to attract wealth.

living_room.wealth: Place your main seating to face this direction for enhanced prosperity.
living_room.sickness: Avoid placing sofas or chairs in this area. Add live plants to neutralize negative energy.
living_room.missing: Hang a mirror on the wall to symbolically complete this corner.

kitchen.wealth: Keep the stove clean and functional. Cook often to activate wealth energy.
kitchen.sickness: Ensure good ventilation in this area. Avoid storing expired food here.
kitchen.missing: Add a small plant on the counter to extend the kitchen's energy.

dining_room.wealth: Host gatherings often. A round table enhances family harmony and prosperity.
dining_room.sickness: Avoid heated arguments at the table. Use soft lighting to maintain peace.
dining_room.missing: Place a mirror to reflect the dining table, symbolizing abundance.

kids_room.wealth: Set up the study desk here for enhanced focus and academic success.
kids_room.sickness: Avoid placing the bed in this area. Add calming blue or green elements.
kids_room.missing: Use cheerful colors and inspiring artwork to complete this corner.

errors.noRoom: Please draw your room shape first
errors.disconnected: Your room has disconnected areas. Only the largest connected region will be analyzed.
